items.title: Guthrie AI raises $4M seed to put a virtual bid assistant on every glazing crew
items.note: 52 glazing contractors already cut bid turnaround from weeks to days, bidding 70% more without adding staff

items.title: TerraFirma raises $115M to pair AI pre-construction software with autonomous heavy machinery
items.note: Kleiner Perkins leads $100M Series A, claims up to 300% operator effectiveness on retrofitted equipment

items.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks to raise at $1.5B valuation
items.note: Robot Ventures leading at least $75M round for the open-source agent with 214,000 GitHub stars

items.title: Slack's Slackbot can now pull CRM data, build charts and send DocuSigns from a chat message
items.note: Salesforce deepens the agent's platform access as it competes with Microsoft Copilot and Google Gemini

items.title: ROAD to Housing Act's built-to-rent carve-out pushes institutional investors toward new construction
items.note: Existing-home buying ban has a loophole for build-to-rent, so big landlords are shifting capital to development pipelines

items.title: ATTOM's mid-year report shows foreclosure activity still climbing toward a 6-year high
items.note: Starts and bank repossessions kept rising through H1 after Q1 filings jumped 26% year-over-year

items.title: Cribl acquires Israeli detection-engineering startup CardinalOps for around $100M
items.note: Founded by Unit 8200 veterans, deal gives Cribl a new Tel Aviv office and agentic SOC tooling

items.title: Hemispheric emerges from six years in stealth with $52M for a foundation AI model of the brain
items.note: Descartes model trained on 250,000+ hours of EEG data, co-founded by the Face ID co-inventor

items.title: Serial founder Shai Morag raises $60M seed for Oak's AI-native identity security platform
items.note: Fourth company for the founder of three prior exits worth ~$500M combined, Accel and Greylock co-lead
